title: Project Report: Approval Workflow with Power Automate — Microsoft Power Platform Developer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Purchase request app + automated approval flow with Teams adaptive cards and Dataverse audit log.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**Approval Workflow with Power Automate** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Microsoft Power Platform Developer. Duration: 2–3 weeks. Purchase request app + automated approval flow with Teams adaptive cards and Dataverse audit log. Tools: Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, Teams.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Canvas app for purchase requests
Objective: Automated approval flow with conditions
Objective: Teams adaptive card notification
Objective: Dataverse table for audit trail
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Microsoft Power Platform Developer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Microsoft Power Platform Developer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Microsoft Power Platform Developer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: App
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: App** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Request form. Complete these tasks: Amount; Category; Justification. Deliverable for this phase: Canvas app.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Amount
- [ ] Category
- [ ] Justification
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase App is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### Where to use it

### Real use example

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: App + flow exports; Teams screenshot; Audit view screenshot. Skills demonstrated: Power Automate, Approvals, Teams. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: App + flow exports
Deliverable: Teams screenshot
Deliverable: Audit view screenshot
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits App + flow exports and passes the rubric.
